title: Software Engineer - Backend
description: Come build the future of local delivery with us At Shipday , our mission is to build better, faster local delivery infrastructure for global e-commerce. Already used in 100+ countries, our customers have processed more than 50 million deliveries on our platform. As a rapidly growing SaaS company, we are committed to leveraging data-driven insights to drive innovation and optimize our services. We are seeking a talented and driven Backend Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to our continued success. Backend Developer As a Backend Developer at Shipday, you will play a critical role in building the core infrastructure of our SaaS platform. You will design and build the core services that keep those deliveries fast, reliable, and secure. Your work will directly impact platform performance, developer velocity, and customer experience. You’ll be collaborating closely with a multi-disciplinary team including engineering, product, and business development to solve complex problems and create data-driven solutions. Who we are looking for Analytical and Problem Solver: You excel at analyzing data and drawing insights to solve complex problems. Inquisitive: You have a natural curiosity and the ability to ask the right questions to understand business needs. Detail-Oriented: You pay close attention to data quality and precision. Collaborative: You excel in a team environment and are able to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Results-Oriented: You focus on delivering actionable insights that have a real impact on the business. Requirements Minimum 3 years of full-time software development experience Previous experience as a Backend Developer or similar role Proficient in Unix, Java, Python Familiar with AWS and microservices Familiar with databases (e.g. SQL and NoSQL) Familiarity with designing and building APIs (eg, REST API’s) Familiarity with Map APIs is a plus (Google Maps etc) Experience in writing unit tests Responsibilities Work within our product teams to design and develop our core backend that support multiple applications Improve our code base through continuous refactoring Solve challenging real-time data transfer and synchronization problems Implement unit tests Be communicative and collaborative

title: Full Stack Engineer

title: NET Core Backend Developer
description: Yazılım sektöründe faaliyet gösteren müşterimiz için; geliştirmekte oldukları yeni nesil, geniş kapsamlı ve çoklu kullanıcı yapısına (multi-tenant) sahip platformun arka plan mimarisini sıfırdan inşa edecek bir takım arkadaşı aramaktayız. Bu rol, hem kapsamlı bir web yönetim panelini hem de son kullanıcıya yönelik dinamik bir mobil uygulamayı besleyecek sistemin geliştirilmesini kapsamakta olup; performans ve veri tutarlılığı en kritik öncelikler arasında yer almaktadır. Görev Tanımı Sistemin temel mimarisini .NET Core (C#) kullanarak, ölçeklenebilir ve güvenli bir şekilde tasarlamak ve geliştirmek. Mobil uygulamanın ve web panellerinin ihtiyaç duyduğu yüksek performanslı RESTful API'ları yazmak. Sistemdeki anlık işlem yoğunluğunu, kapasite/kota kontrollerini ve eşzamanlılık (concurrency) gerektiren karmaşık iş kurallarını veritabanı seviyesinde hatasız yönetmek. Hiyerarşik ve çok katmanlı kullanıcı rollerine göre detaylı yetkilendirme (Authorization/Authentication) altyapısını kurmak. Veritabanı mimarisinin tasarlanması, sorgu optimizasyonlarının yapılması ve Entity Framework Core süreçlerinin yönetilmesi. Aranan Nitelikler Üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, C# ve .NET Core ekosisteminde en az 3 yıl profesyonel geliştirme tecrübesine sahip, Yapay zeka destekli kodlama araçlarını (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude vb.) günlük iş akışına entegre etmiş ve bu araçları geliştirme süreçlerini hızlandırmak için aktif kullanan, RESTful API tasarımı ve geliştirilmesi konusunda uzman, İlişkisel veritabanları (MS SQL, PostgreSQL vb.) konusunda derinlemesine bilgi sahibi ve ORM (EF Core vb.) araçlarını etkin kullanabilen, SOLID prensiplerine, temiz kod (Clean Code) yazma standartlarına ve yazılım mimarilerine hakim, Eşzamanlılık (Concurrency), locking mekanizmaları, anlık veri işleme ve transaction yönetimi konularında tecrübeli, Versiyon kontrol sistemlerini (Git) aktif kullanan. Tüm başvurular titizlikle değerlendirilecek olup, yalnızca uygun bulunan adaylarla iletişime geçilecektir.

title: Full Stack Developer (Backend Focus)
description: Yazılım ekibimizi büyütüyoruz. Bulut tabanlı SaaS ürünler, özel yazılım projeleri, kurumsal web çözümleri ve e-ticaret altyapıları geliştiriyoruz. Modern teknolojilerle çalışan projelerimizde görev alacak, backend tarafı güçlü bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Nitelikler Node.js, TypeScript ve Next.js teknolojilerinde deneyimli Backend ağırlıklı geliştirme yapabilen Bulut altyapı, deployment ve ölçeklenebilir sistem mantığını bilen En az 3 yıl gerçek proje deneyimi olan Teknik dokümantasyonu takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilen Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya dengi 4 yıllık bölümlerinden mezun Sorumluluklar SaaS ve özel yazılım projelerinde aktif geliştirme yapmak Backend servisleri ve API süreçlerini geliştirmek Mevcut projelerde performans ve yapı iyileştirmeleri yapmak Gerektiğinde frontend tarafına destek vermek Tercih Sebepleri SaaS ürün geliştirme tecrübesi Admin panel, dashboard veya çok kullanıcılı sistem geliştirme deneyimi E-ticaret, kurumsal yazılım veya içerik tabanlı projelerde görev almış olmak Veritabanı tasarımı ve backend mimarisi konusunda güçlü olmak Önemli Not Bu pozisyon, gerçek proje deneyimi olan adaylar içindir. Sadece eğitim, kurs veya başlangıç seviyesinde bilgiye sahip adayların başvurmaması rica olunur. Uzaktan çalışma seçeneği yoktur. Sadece ofisten tam zamanlı çalışma için uygundur. Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz.

title: Full Stack Intern(Fast Paced)
description: 🚫 Before You Apply — Read This Carefully This internship program is not for everyone. It’s designed for people who want to grow fast, take ownership, and operate in a high-performance environment. If you cannot handle the following, please do not apply. You expect hand-holding : We’ll guide you, but we won’t spoon-feed you. You’ll be expected to research and learn fast. You see this as “just an internship.” : This is a launchpad not a pastime. If you treat it casually, you’ll struggle. If you treat it seriously, you’ll grow faster than most entry-level professionals. You think you can separate your goals from the company’s: If your personal growth doesn’t align with the company’s mission, this won’t work. We want people who are building their careers through the work, not around it. You dislike wearing multiple hats : In fast-moving environments, you’ll touch design, strategy, testing, communication, and more. Adaptability is key. You’re uncomfortable with feedback or intensity: We move fast, review constantly, and push for better results daily. If feedback or urgency feels like pressure this is not your environment. You’re short-term minded : If you’re here for quick status or social validation this isn’t the place. You can’t handle accountability : Everyone here owns outcomes, not excuses. We value progress over perfection — but you must take responsibility for your work. ✅ If You’re Still Reading and Nodding You’ll Thrive Here This program will challenge you, but it will also transform you. You’ll gain hands-on experience, real mentorship, and the mindset to succeed anywhere. This internship is a great opportunity to gain real-world, hands-on experience while contributing meaningfully to exciting projects. You’ll work closely with designers and developers to bring ideas to life . Compensation: NONE 📆 Duration: 6 months 🌍 Remote,Flexible 📅 Weekdays: Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday or Thursday, Friday and Saturday As a full stack developer intern, you will: Collaborate closely with designers and other developers to transform design mockups into user-friendly and responsive web applications. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code using React, TypeScript, Express, and SQL. Implement interactive features and user interfaces, ensuring a seamless user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Develop and maintain back-end services and APIs, ensuring robust and scalable server-side logic. Learn and improve your skills in both front-end and back-end development, including API integration. Contribute to optimizing web applications for performance, scalability, and accessibility. Stay updated with the latest trends and technologies in full stack development. We are looking for someone who: Has a minimum of one year of dedicated learning experience in web development through online courses, bootcamps, or personal projects. Possesses a strong understanding of React, TypeScript, Express, and SQL, or has a strong desire to learn. Has a keen eye for detail and a commitment to writing clean, well-structured code. Enjoys challenges and is always eager to learn new things. Is a team player with excellent communication and collaboration skills.

title: React Native Mobile Developer (iOS & Android)
description: Bilişim Vadisi Urla Kampüsü'nde faaliyet gösteren müşterimiz, Investa Teknoloji A.Ş. için; kullanıcıların anlık etkileşimde bulunabileceği, zengin medya içeriklerini tüketebileceği ve dinamik zamanlama/kayıt süreçlerini gerçekleştirebileceği yeni mobil uygulama projesini hayata geçirecek bir takım arkadaşı aramaktayız. Bu rol kapsamında, kullanıcı deneyimi (UX) ve yüksek performans önceliğiyle iOS ve Android platformlarında uygulamanın geliştirilmesi ve yayına alınması beklenmektedir. Görev Tanımı Platformun mobil bacağını React Native framework'ü kullanarak tek bir kod tabanından geliştirmek. Backend ekibi tarafından sağlanan RESTful API'ları entegre ederek, uygulamanın veri akışını dinamik ve hatasız bir şekilde sağlamak. Uygulama içi anlık veri güncellemelerini, karmaşık liste/takvim yapılarını ve zaman kısıtlı işlem ekranlarını pürüzsüz bir arayüzle kullanıcıya sunmak. Anlık bildirimler ve hatırlatmalar için "Push Notification" (FCM/APNs) entegrasyonlarını ve tetikleyici kurgularını yapmak. Hazırlanan UI/UX tasarımlarını (Figma vb.), tüm ekran boyutlarına uyumlu ve "pixel-perfect" detaycılığıyla koda dökmek. Aranan Nitelikler Üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, React Native ve React ekosisteminde en az 3 yıl profesyonel deneyime sahip, Yapay zeka destekli geliştirme asistanlarını (GitHub Copilot, Cursor vb.) aktif kullanarak kod yazım, hata ayıklama ve refactoring süreçlerinde verimliliğini artıran, iOS ve Android uygulama yayınlama (App Store Connect, Google Play Console) süreçlerine hakim, State Management (Redux, Context API, Zustand vb.) konularında tecrübeli, RESTful API entegrasyonu, asenkron işlemler ve hata yönetimi konusunda deneyimli, Push Notification servisleri (Firebase Cloud Messaging vb.) entegrasyonu yapmış, Mobil cihazların performans optimizasyonları ve bellek yönetimi konularında bilgi sahibi. Tüm başvurular titizlikle değerlendirilecek olup, yalnızca uygun bulunan adaylarla iletişime geçilecektir.

title: Backend Game Developer
description: About Spyke Games We are a leading mobile gaming company founded by gaming veterans who have built and scaled massive gaming businesses for the past decade. We want to build the next generation of mobile game franchises to be played by millions of people around the globe for years. We are bringing together the smartest, the most talented and ‘fun to work with’ group of people united around this single mission. Fostered with team spirit and collaboration, we strive to create a passionate, energetic and eager to learn “geek” culture focused on games. We are looking for an experienced Backend Game Developer to join our engineering team. At Spyke, you will be crafting code to contribute to the development process while developing your engineering & game development skills. If you are eager to jump into challenges and work on world-class projects, Spyke is the right place for you. Job Responsibilies Developing backend game services on schedule in an agile daily life cycle with other talented developers and product managers. Improving previously implemented features and fixing bugs in any area (gameplay, network messaging, architecture, data store, scheduled jobs, etc.) Making peer code reviews to check the quality & learn from it as well. Write clean, sustainable code and create extendable, scalable architecture. Monitoring and maintenance of live game services. Improve yourself inside Spyke engineering culture to contribute to the global game development community. Job Requirements University degree in Computer Science or any equivalent department. Experience in the gaming industry with knowledge of synchronous multiplayer games. +2 years of experience, deep understanding of Java with experience in best practices, idioms, GC, and memory optimization. RESTful Web Service and Application development experience with SpringBoot Experience in concurrency, distributed systems, network protocols & optimization. Knowledge in NoSQL, Relational(MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.), and in-memory databases. Excellent understanding of software architecture, design, and development. Having strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals. Eager to search, discuss and learn new technologies and adapt them into our games and related code libraries. Comfortable with investigating & reading in English Having analytical, practical problem-solving skillsPrevious experience on high traffic services on the AWS platform. Hands-on experience in a programming language other than Java. We respect your privacy and will treat your data confidential as part of the recruitment process. If you’d like more details, please read our Statement of Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK)

title: Backend Developer (12 Month-Fixed Term Contract)
description: At Flormar, we were born in Milan in the 1950s; growing and evolving in Turkey’s multicultural, vibrant world, we have become a global brand that adds color to beauty. Since the day we were founded, we have prioritized the joy women get from makeup and how it makes them feel good, while working to make beauty accessible to everyone. With our products, through clean ingredients, our cruelty-free policy and our sustainable production approach, we make a difference not only in beauty but also in values. Today, in more than 70 countries, with nearly 60,000 online & offline sales points from chain perfumeries to our website, from marketplaces to our stores, from catalog sales to wholesale channels, we reach and inspire millions of people. All our production processes and logistics operations are carried out at our factory and logistics center in Gebze. Our headquarters are located at Akasya Business Towers in Üsküdar, Istanbul. At Flormar, our journey is shaped by our values. At every step, we act with passion, proud of everything we do, seize opportunities with agility, and make sustainable contributions to the future. Because for us, this is not just a workplace; it is the way to touch lives and color the future together! Key Competencies That Will Make You Stand Out 3+ years of professional backend development with .NET (C#), Solid experience building RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core (Web API), Comfortable developing and maintaining .NET console applications for scheduled jobs, data processing, and ETL tasks, Proficiency in SQL Server — query writing, stored procedures, and basic schema design, Experience consuming and exposing third-party APIs (REST); familiarity with JSON and XML data formats, Understanding of OOP principles, clean code practices, and basic design patterns (Repository, Service layer), Daily Git usage; comfortable with pull requests and branch-based workflows, NET 6+ / ASP.NET Core Web API · C# · Entity Framework Core, SQL Server · T-SQL · stored procedures, REST API design and consumption · JSON / XML, Task scheduling: Windows Task Scheduler, Hangfire, or similar, Basic understanding of authentication: JWT, API keys, Git, UiPath: Hands-on RPA development experience with UiPath Studio — building attended or unattended automation workflows, Familiarity with UiPath Orchestrator for bot deployment and monitoring, Experience with ERP system integrations (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, or similar), Exposure to message queues or event-driven patterns (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus), Reliable, delivery-focused developer who works well under defined timelines, Good communicator — able to work with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, Comfortable picking up existing codebases and contributing quickly. What to Expect in This Role Design and develop .NET-based APIs , Develop console applications to support internal systems, Contribute to and support integration pipelines, Work on solutions that support internal system integrations, Experience with RPA tools is a plus, but not required. What Awaits You in Flormar’s Colorful World? Work from anywhere for three weeks each year thanks to our flexible working model. Start your weekends early during the summer with Happy Fridays. Celebrate your birthday wherever you like with your birthday leave. Enjoy the option of working remotely for a full year after maternity leave. Benefit from two weeks of paid paternity leave to create unforgettable memories with your growing family. Contribute to projects that make the world a better place with our social responsibility leave. Bring your passions into work life with our F Social clubs. Add colorful breaks and joyful moments to your day with Colorful Hours. Shape your own development journey: Udemy Business, Flormar Development Catalogue, leadership development programs and much more with you. At Flormar, every new day is an opportunity to learn, discover and shine! Are you ready to join us? As Flormar, we adopt the principle of equal opportunity and equal behavior in education and recruitment. All applicants who applies to our job ads will be considered for employment; regardless to race, sex , color or social origin, ethnicity religion, pregnancy, disability, sexual orientation gender expression or political opinion

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)-İstanbul
description: Who Are We? title: Founding Engineer - Backend
description: About Ecopass: Ecopass is a future-forward tech company building infrastructure for circular, transparent and trusted product ecosystem. About the role: We are hiring a Founding Engineer to own and evolve the backend foundation of Ecopass . This is a backend-first role with real influence over architecture, data model quality, API standards, tenant isolation, reliability, and the way product truth moves across the platform. Today, the production core is Laravel/PostgreSQL. Over time, one of the important missions of this role is to help evolve the backend foundation toward a stronger TypeScript/NestJS architecture where it makes technical and product sense. This is not a junior or ticket-closing role ; it is a high-ownership role for someone who wants to shape core systems early and work at the boundary of product, device workflows, and applied AI. What you will own: Backend architecture across data modelling, API design, versioning, testing standards, multi-tenancy, RBAC, and operational reliability. API consistency across our internal platform and consumer-facing product experiences. Productionization of NFC workflows, product lifecycle flows, and selected AI-backed capabilities. Device-to-cloud foundations for representing physical products as live, queryable entities. Observability, deployment confidence, queue/background job reliability, and engineering discipline. What success looks like in your first 6 months: Improve API consistency and backend standards across product surfaces. Strengthen tenant isolation, RBAC, and production-grade data modelling. Raise reliability across logging, monitoring, background jobs, and deployment workflows. Ship pragmatic improvements across Platform, CRM and selected AI-related workflows. What we are looking for: Graduate of Computer Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering from one of Turkey’s leading universities. A master’s degree is a plus. Minimum 3 years of meaningful engineering experience. In exceptional cases, we may also consider candidates with 2 years of full-time post-graduation experience plus 1 year of substantial long-term internship experience . Strong backend depth in Node.js and TypeScript ; NestJS is highly valuable, but not mandatory. Strong SQL and PostgreSQL fundamentals, including indexing, query optimisation, schema design, and migration-safe thinking. Ability to design clean APIs and make sound architectural trade-offs. Genuine interest in AI as a product capability, not just as an API wrapper. High ownership and comfort operating in an early-stage environment where decisions matter. How you work: You communicate clearly and proactively-in writing and in person. You have strong ethical standards and good judgment. You are self-driven and do not need task-by-task management to move important work forward. You reason well under ambiguity, break problems down clearly, and make thoughtful trade-offs. You care about building trust: in systems, in products, and in how a team works together. Nice to have: Docker, CI/CD, Kubernetes, Azure or similar cloud environments, queues, event-driven systems, structured logging, PyTorch, LLM orchestration, vector stores, retrieval, MLOps, MQTT, CoAP, IoT pipelines, or digital twin architectures. Relevant tech environment: Today, the core backend is Laravel 12 / PHP 8.2 + PostgreSQL . The platform and DPP surfaces are React 19/Vite applications. Some fetaures run as a separate TypeScript/Hono service. Shared infrastructure is managed through Terraform, Helm, Kubernetes, and Azure/AKS , and RF operations connect through dedicated bridge tooling. Why Ecopass: Ecopass is building around a closed loop: B2B creates product truth, B2C activates and uses it, and lifecycle events feed back into operations. That gives this role both technical depth and real product consequence. Founding-level impact on a real product category. Early traction: initial round closed at a $1.6M valuation , selected into TÜSİAD BGİV , accepted into Bilişim Vadisi Teknopark and already generating revenue. Close collaboration with product, hardware-adjacent, and university-linked R&D. Competitive salary plus ESOP of up to 1% for exceptional fit. Hiring process: Intro conversation → Technical/case round → On-site conversation → Final: founder & investor meeting. We aim to move fast and close this hire within 5 weeks . Apply: Send us your CV, LinkedIn profile, and any GitHub or portfolio links that help us understand how you think and build.

title: Développeur PHP Symfony - Lille
description: Notre Pôle PHP C’est Intégrer un partenaire de Sensiolabs et sponsor du Symfony Live depuis plus de 10 ans ! Rejoindre nos élites au sein d’une des équipes les plus certifiées de France sur Symfony Adhérer à notre plan d’Excellence via nos process de certifications Participer activement aux réunions techniques de pôle, accéder à nos formations internes (ou en dispenser) Participer à nos PHP Contest pointus Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Certifié Great Place To Work depuis 2018 Possibilité d’être formé et certifié par Webnet Ambiance conviviale avec des évènements internes récurrents (activités sportives, loisirs etc…) ainsi que la garantie d’un équilibre entre votre vie privée et professionnelle Participation à des challenges hebdomadaires : Team #dragondefeu vs #dragondeglace Membre de la charte éthique & diversité (+ 15 nationalités représentées) & Dragon Funding (programme de soutien associatif) Nos petits + : 2 types de primes : de régie et participation Carte ticket restaurant : SWILE (9€ par jour) 🥣 Prise en charge à 80% des abonnements en transport en commun Des convaincus du télétravail Avantage ancienneté : à partir de 2 ans, Webnet vous rembourse un abonnement quel qu’il soit via des coins qui se cumulent WEBNET c’est : 200 collaborateurs (dragonniers) passionnés avec une expertise de plus de 25 ans en architectures web & mobile, comme en témoignent les plus de 2000 projets d’envergure à son actif que ce soit sur : PHP / Symfony, JAVA EE, Microsoft .NET, Angular, React, IONIC...). Nous avons à cœur de proposer différentes missions à nos collaborateurs (liberté de choix), tout en vous permettant d’évoluer et d’agrandir votre champ de compétences. C’est au travers de différents suivis et échanges que nous regardons avec vous votre carrière et votre évolution opérationnelles et techniques. Nous savons que les technologies évoluent très rapidement, c’est pourquoi, notre catalogue de formation proposent tous les trimestres, 3 formations minimum autour de nos technos phares, dispensées par nos architectes techniques. Webnet aide également bénévolement des associations éthiques et citoyennes dans le développement de leur transformation digitale (programme de mécénat). Afin de rejoindre la DragonForce , voici notre process, vous échangerez avec différents membres de nos équipes : 1/ Mattéo vous contactera directement pour un premier échange 2/ L’un de nos architectes du pôle PHP se fera un plaisir de discuter technique avec vous et d’analyser votre test réalisé précédemment 3/ Un dernier échange avec Tony et Julien sera organisé afin de finaliser le processus L’adresse de nos locaux : 55 rue de Luxembourg, gare Lille Europe Nous sommes également présents sur : Nantes, Lyon, Paris et Bordeaux. A compétences égales, la candidature d’une personne bénéficiaire de l’obligation d’emploi sera privilégiée Profil Recherché Serez-vous notre prochain Dragonnier ? Rejoignez notamment Amine, Antoine et André ! Ils sont prêts à accueillir un(e) vrai(e) passionné(e) du développement afin de renforcer notre pôle PHP : PHP 8.x, Symfony 6 (4 ans minimum d’expérience) Intégration continue : Jenkins, Gitlab CI Recherche : ElasticSearch Système : Docker, Graylog, SensioLabs Insight, Scrutinizer BDD : MariaDB, PostGreSQL Vos plus : à défaut de maîtriser, vous êtes prêt à vous investir à nos côtés, sur : Une ou plusieurs technos Front (Angular, React.js ou Vue.js) Laravel, Drupal 9, Sylius Cache : Redis, Varnish MongoDB, Neo4J, RabbitMQ Services AWS et GCP Outils : PhpStorm, Webpack, GIT, Blackfire D’autres technos récentes ou en devenir pour nos prochains challenges

title: Software Developer – Full Stack (Laravel/PHP)
description: About The Company LGH is a global leader in the hire of lifting equipment, with operations across the UK, Europe, the USA, and Australia. For over 50 years, we’ve earned the trust of major industries through our unwavering commitment to safety, reliability, and technical excellence. From complex infrastructure projects to everyday lifting needs, our equipment and expertise support customers worldwide. As a forward-thinking business, we continue to invest significantly in our systems, technology, and most importantly, our people. We’ve fostered a collaborative and supportive environment where talented individuals can thrive, innovate, and make a genuine impact. Summary Of The Role Are you a collaborative team player with strong communication skills? Are you passionate about clean code and solving real-world business problems? Do you want to contribute to a growing, people-focused organisation with a global footprint? We’re seeking an experienced Full Stack Software Developer to join our in-house development team. You’ll play a key role in building, maintaining, and improving core systems that power our global operations. A particular focus of the role will be helping us modernise and streamline our application stack. Overview Of Accountabilities This is a full-stack development role focused on delivering modern web applications using Laravel and PHP. You'll work closely with UK and US-based teams, developing core systems that drive our operations. From architecting new solutions to improving performance, you'll play a critical role in shaping our tech direction. You’ll collaborate on business-critical systems, building new features, improving existing systems, and ensuring the security, performance, and maintainability of our applications Key Responsibilities Technical Development Design and develop scalable, maintainable web applications using PHP (v8+) and Laravel (v8–12) Architect application features and champion best practices Build interactive UIs using Livewire, Alpine.js, and Tailwind CSS Develop and maintain RESTful APIs; integrate with external services Handle queue systems and background processes (Redis, queues) Design caching strategies for performance optimisation Write and maintain unit, feature, and integration tests Code Quality Manage Git repositories and ensure clean version control practices Set up and manage CI/CD pipelines (e.g. GitHub Actions, DeployHQ) Maintain clear documentation and promote coding standards System Architecture & Performance Design database schemas, manage migrations, and optimise complex queries Ensure scalability, availability, and security across systems Monitor performance using logs and monitoring tools Work with infrastructure teams to deploy and maintain systems Project Delivery & Communication Translate business requirements into technical solutions Participate in sprint planning, retrospectives, and backlog grooming Communicate effectively across departments and time zones Document architecture, APIs, and deployment procedures Contribute to the long-term technical roadmap QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPERIENCE Core Technical Skills 3+ years of commercial development experience Strong PHP (7.3–8.4) knowledge and modern OOP best practices Laravel (v8–12) expertise, including Eloquent, service providers, etc. Livewire (v2/v3) with Alpine.js for reactive front-end functionality Tailwind CSS (v3/v4) for modern, responsive UI development Tooling & Workflow Git and GitHub workflows (branching, pull requests, code reviews) Experience with CI/CD and deployment automation MySQL query optimisation, indexing, and database migrations Understanding of Linux servers, web server configuration (Nginx/Apache) Soft Skills Excellent communication (written and verbal) Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Self-motivated and comfortable working both independently and as part of a team Familiar with Agile methodologies and asynchronous collaboration Desirable (Not Essential) Experience with other PHP frameworks (Symfony, CodeIgniter) Docker and containerisation tools (Docker Compose, Kubernetes) Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) Familiarity with testing frameworks (PHPUnit, Pest, Cypress) WORKING PATTERN: Days: Monday to Friday Hours: 40 hours per week between 8am – 5pm Company Benefits 25 days Annual Leave (+1 per year capped at 30) Pension scheme Free lifting gear hire Quarterly incentive programme Training & development support Length of service recognition H.I.R.E Fit wellbeing scheme Optional team trips, including company-organised ski trips and social events Ability to commute/relocate: Home-based Important Information: We are not accepting applications from recruitment agencies for this vacancy. Only applicants with an existing legal right to work in the EU will be considered. Unfortunately, we are unable to provide sponsorship or support visa applications at this time.

title: Développeur PHP/Symfony (H/F)
description: Meritis est un cabinet de conseil, pilotage et développement IT fondé en 2007 présent à Paris, Sophia-Antipolis, Aix-en-Provence, Montpellier, Toulouse, Nantes... Et bientôt sur de nouveaux territoires ! Notre mission ? Connecter les meilleurs talents aux entreprises pour leur donner un temps d’avance. Nous accompagnons nos clients dans l’intégralité de leurs besoins en transformation numérique à travers de nombreux domaines d’expertises : Software Engineering, Finance, Pilotage de projets, Devops, Data, Cloud, Cybersécurité ou encore Agilité. Intervenant aussi bien dans les secteurs de la Banque, de l'Assurance, des Télécommunications que de l'Industrie ou des Transports, aujourd'hui 40% des entreprises du CAC40 sont clientes Meritis. Fort de nos valeurs d’exigence, d’humilité, de bienveillance et de proximité, nous comptons aujourd’hui plus de 900 collaborateurs. Nous mettons un point d’honneur à être proche de nos collaborateurs et à les accompagner de manière individualisée quelles que soient leurs fonctions dans l’entreprise. Certifiée Great Place To Work depuis 2013, notre conception du bien-être au travail va bien au-delà d'un simple label, ce sont nos collaborateurs qui en parlent le mieux : https://www.glassdoor.fr/Avis/Meritis-Avis-E1163008.htm. Description Du Poste Dans le cadre de projets stratégiques, nous recherchons un profil expérimenté pour intervenir sur le développement backend et accompagner une migration vers le cloud public. Vos missions : Développement backend PHP/Symfony Participation à la migration des applications vers le cloud public Mise en place et exécution des plans de test Gestion des mises en production Maintenance évolutive et corrective (évolutions fonctionnelles, bugs, mises à jour techniques) Veille technologique et force de proposition pour accélérer la transformation Compétences techniques clés : PHP & Symfony2 MySQL Kubernetes GitLab & GitLab CI APIs / Webservices Sécurité (Fortify) JavaScript (Angular, jQuery) Architecture cloud & microservices Gestion des incidents Un plus : DevOps Tests & intégration continue Versionning Qualifications Diplôme d'ingénieur ou équivalent Bac+5 en informatique Minimum 3 ans d'expérience en développement PHP/Symfony Bonne capacité d’adaptation et de communication Orientation résultats et qualité de service Capacité à produire des spécifications techniques et de la documentation Maîtrise des architectures microservices et de la conception orientée objet Anglais professionnel Informations supplémentaires Des parcours professionnels sur mesure (évolution de carrière, formations adaptées, mentoring…) ; Avoir le choix de sa mission et un accompagnement personnalisé tout au long de votre carrière ; Evoluer dans un environnement où l’apprentissage est favorisé : formations certifiantes, e-learning, meetUp, concours de code, parcours d’évolutions etc ; Faire partie de communautés d’experts qui partagent leurs savoirs et expériences au sein de nos centres de compétences ; Un environnement convivial avec de nombreux événements festifs (soirée annuelle, séminaires & teambuiding, déjeuners et afterworks…) ; "Meritis est engagée dans la Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises. Nous valorisons notre impact positif sur la société et l'environnement. Notre démarche RSE guide chacune de nos actions pour promouvoir l'équité, la durabilité et le bien-être de nos collaborateurs. Rejoignez-nous pour être partie prenante de cette démarche responsable, où chacun de nos talents contribue à construire un avenir meilleur. Nos différences sont nos atouts. C’est pourquoi Meritis s'implique en faveur de la diversité et de la non-discrimination. Tous nos métiers sont accessibles aux personnes en situation de handicap."

title: PHP Web Application Developer (Modernization)
description: EBG is an e-commerce solutions provider specializing in travel and entertainment, and also offering retail products and services, voluntary benefits and insurance. EBG powers a robust portfolio of technology solutions and operates a network of employer and membership-based platforms reaching a captive audience, providing leading brands with incremental distribution opportunities. EBG's expanded network reaches over 100 million users from participating companies and closed loop affinity and membership groups. EBG owns and operates one of the largest and most comprehensive employee savings programs in the country — serving over 40,000 corporate clients through its proprietary platforms TicketsatWork, Plum Benefits, Working Advantage and Beneplace. EBG is a b2b2c company headquartered in Miami (Aventura), with offices in New York, Orlando, and Austin. We offer a hybrid work environment with a balance of collaboration and flexibility. Job Description In this role you will embark on a large-scale, multi-year modernization initiative to transform a legacy monolithic PHP application into a modern, microservice-oriented architecture hosted on AWS. Your role as a Web Developer will bring deep experience in API-driven development, AWS cloud infrastructure, and modern DevOps practices to help drive this transformation. You’ll play a key role in decoupling business domains, architecting, implementing, and maintaining new microservices using Symfony/Doctrine or similar frameworks. Your focus will be on delivering high-quality, secure, and scalable API integrations. Ideally, you bring hands-on experience across the full development lifecycle — from design and implementation to CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code — all within an Agile Scrum environment. This role is primarily WFH / Remote for Florida and Texas candidates. **You must reside in FL or TX** to be hired for this position. You may be asked to travel to an office occasionally depending on project needs. The first day will be onsite in Orlando, FL. We do not provide sponsorship for this role and we do not contract outside of the US. Key Responsibilities Have strong presence in the decoupling of the existing PHP monolith into domain-driven microservices and APIs. Design, develop, and maintain back-end services using Symfony (or equivalent MVC frameworks) and Doctrine ORM. Architect and implement RESTful APIs and ensure consistent documentation, testing, and versioning practices. Build and consume third-party APIs, ensuring performance, scalability, and security best practices. Collaborate closely with DevOps and Infrastructure teams to design cloud-native solutions using AWS services (e.g., Lambda, ECS, EKS, S3, API Gateway). Containerize applications using Docker and manage orchestration via Kubernetes/ECS. Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support rapid, reliable deployments. Leverage infrastructure-as-code (IaC) tools to ensure reproducible and maintainable environments. Contribute to architectural design discussions, code reviews, and cross-functional planning. Work within an Agile Scrum framework, participating in sprint grooming, planning, demo, and retrospectives. Collaborate with Product, QA, and Analytics teams to ensure feature alignment and data integrity. Qualifications 5+ years of professional experience in back-end development with PHP (Symfony or other MVC frameworks preferred). Strong understanding of microservice architecture and API-first design principles. Proven experience deploying and managing applications on AWS (ECS, EKS, Lambda, API Gateway, RDS, CloudWatch, etc.). description: À propos de Yes We Hack Fondée en 2015, YesWeHack propose aux entreprises une approche innovante de la cybersécurité, grâce au Bug Bounty (récompense pour vulnérabilités), en connectant plus de 135 000 experts en cybersécurité (hackers éthiques) répartis dans 130 pays, et les entreprises pour sécuriser leurs périmètres exposés et rechercher des vulnérabilités (bugs) dans leurs sites web, applications mobiles, infrastructures et objets connectés. YesWeHack est la principale plateforme de Bug Bounty en Europe, et possède des bureaux à Paris, Rennes et Rouen (France), ainsi qu'à Singapour (Asie). Le poste Vous rejoignez une équipe expérimentée pour faire évoluer et maintenir notre plateforme de Bug Bounty et de gestion des vulnérabilités. Votre rôle : concevoir et livrer des fonctionnalités complètes, du frontend Angular au backend Symfony, avec un haut niveau d’exigence en qualité, sécurité et performance. Nous ne faisons pas de la technologie pour la technologie : chaque ligne de code sert un produit, un business et des utilisateurs. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec les autres développeurs, mais aussi avec notre équipe Produit pour créer des solutions utiles et efficaces. Vos missions Concevoir, développer et livrer des fonctionnalités de bout en bout Maintenir, refactorer et sécuriser le code existant Écrire et maintenir des tests unitaires, d’intégration et end-to-end Documenter l’architecture, les API et les composants Contribuer à la performance, à la sécurité et à l’observabilité Participer aux revues de code et au partage de connaissances Compétences techniques Framework JavaScript moderne (Angular, Vue.js, Next.js) + maîtrise de TypeScript, HTML, CSS Outils de build (Webpack, Vite ou équivalent) Frameworks de tests frontend (Jest, Playwright…) Développement backend en PHP avec framework moderne (Symfony, Laravel) ORM (Doctrine ou équivalent) Conception d’API REST Frameworks de tests backend (PHPUnit, Codeception) Bases de données SQL (MySQL/MariaDB, PostgreSQL) Docker, Docker Compose, Linux Git + CI/CD (GitLab ou équivalent) Anglais professionnel (B2+) Ce qui fera la différence Intérêt marqué pour la cybersécurité Envie d’apprendre et de partager vos connaissances avec l’équipe (revue, pairing, retours d’expérience) Sensibilité UX/UI et design system Participation à des projets open source Votre profil Vous aimez comprendre les besoins métier et l’impact de vos développements Vous êtes rigoureux, pragmatique et orienté solution Vous avez le goût du travail en équipe et du partage de connaissances Vous êtes curieux, apprenez vite et cherchez à progresser en continu Vous avez une vraie attention pour la qualité, la sécurité et la performance Vous êtes ouvert aux outils d’IA générative et prêt à les utiliser de manière pragmatique dans votre travail Environnement technique Langages: PHP, Typescript, Python, SQL Framework: Symfony, Angular, Flask, Vue.js, Next.js, Django SGBD: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis Broker: Kafka, RabbitMQ Outils DevOps: GitLab CI, docker/docker compose Environnement de travail Équipes de développement réparties entre Rennes et Rouen Télétravail possible jusqu’à 3 jours par semaine Culture de l’amélioration continue et de la formation Important Nous savons qu’il est rare de cocher toutes les cases. L’essentiel est de savoir où vous êtes déjà à l’aise et ce que vous êtes prêt à apprendre. Si vous vous reconnaissez dans notre état d’esprit et nos ambitions, nous serons ravis d’échanger avec vous.

title: Senior PHP Developer
location: Nederhorst den Berg, North Holland, Netherlands
description: Ga als ontwikkelaar aan de slag met uitdagende vraagstukken voor één van de grootste e-commerce partijen. Werk met de nieuwste technologieën en groei met ons mee! Tech stack De afdeling werkt met tech en tools als PHP, MySQL, Symfony, ElasticSearch, Kubernetes, Figma en meer! Uitdagende projecten Innovatie staat centraal in jouw werk aan complexe projecten. Leuk team Binnen het IT-team is veel ruimte voor gezelligheid. Jouw ontwikkeling Blijf leren en doorgroeien! Je krijgt alle ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen en verder te groeien in jouw specialisme. Wat ga je doen? Analyseren, programmeren en creatief nadenken… Ontwikkelen doe jij het liefst elke dag, of het nu om een applicatie of persoonlijke groei van jou of jouw team gaat. Jouw inbreng brengt ons ontwikkelteam verder. Met de laatste tech en de beste tools werk je voor miljoenen klanten. Je komt in een highly skilled development team met de drive om van elkaar te leren. Je werkt in een internationale omgeving met vestigingen in heel Europa. Je wordt onderdeel van één van onze 6 scrumteams, die elk met sprints van 2 tot 3 weken werken. Zowel zelfstandig als in teamverband werk je aan de applicaties die we intern ontwikkelen. Denk bijvoorbeeld aan het toevoegen van nieuwe functies aan de webshop(s) of het verbeteren van onze logistieke systemen. Ook help je de Lead Developer met het coachen van junior en medior collega’s. We hebben innovatiedagen waarop jij kunt werken aan innovatieve projecten die jou interesseren. Laat je creativiteit los op de meest interessante vraagstukken en breng verbeteringen aan waar het hele bedrijf van profiteert. Ook onze andere (internationale) webwinkels maken gebruik van het door onszelf ontwikkelde e-commerceplatform en ERP-systeem. Als PHP Developer wordt jouw werk dus direct ingezet voor meerdere webshops in verschillende landen. We werken o.a. met PHP 8, MySQL 8, ElasticSearch, RabbitMQ, Kubernetes en Angular. Symfony is onze basis voor backend ontwikkeling en TypeScript voor frontend. We houden onze technologieën up-to-date, staan open voor nieuwe ideeën en innovaties en deinzen niet terug voor complexe migraties. Benieuwd naar het soort code waar wij naar streven? Neem dan alvast een kijkje op onze GitHub-pagina. Dit krijg je van ons! Uitstekend salaris en een aantrekkelijke pensioenregeling (wij betalen 75%). Auto van de zaak met tankpas of een reiskostenvergoeding. Flexibele werktijden en de mogelijkheid tot thuiswerken. 25 vakantiedagen o.b.v. fulltime dienstverband. Veel aandacht voor jouw ontwikkeling door training en opleidingen. Toegang tot 100+ trainingen in onze Online Academy. Elke twee weken een massage. Toegang tot het platform Corporate Benefits met aantrekkelijke kortingen op mode, elektronica, vakanties, dagjes uit en nog veel meer. Een gezellige werkomgeving met de leukste collega's. Wat vragen wij? Je hebt minimaal hbo-werk- en denkniveau. Je hebt minimaal 6 jaar ervaring als Senior Software Developer. PHP en SQL kennen geen geheimen voor jou en object georiënteerd programmeren is je tweede natuur. Je hebt diepgaande technische kennis en analytisch inzicht. Je bent leergierig, ambitieus en deelt graag kennis. Je spreekt en schrijft uitstekend Nederlands en/of Engels. Het team De IT-afdeling bestaat uit ongeveer 95 medewerkers die over veel kennis beschikken. De afdeling heeft een informele sfeer en biedt naast werken ook veel ruimte voor gezelligheid. Denk aan game nights, borrels en teamuitjes. Zelfstandig werken is belangrijk, maar samenwerking en kennisdeling staan centraal, zodat we continu van elkaar leren en ons ontwikkelen. Zo ziet de sollicitatieprocedure eruit Telefonische intake We nemen telefonisch contact met je op. Kennismaking We nodigen je uit voor een kennismaking bij ons op kantoor. Assessment Voor sommige functies maakt een assessment onderdeel uit van de procedure. Tweede gesprek Klikt het? Dan gaan we in het tweede gesprek nog iets dieper in op de functie. Voorstel We willen graag dat je bij ons komt werken en sturen je een voorstel. Impact maken als IT'er Jouw IT-oplossingen hebben een enorme impact in binnen- en buitenland. Je werkt met de nieuwste tech en ontvangt een aantrekkelijke beloning, terwijl je volop ruimte krijgt om te groeien én je eigen projecten te starten. Hoe gaaf is dat?! Duik diep in de features, werk aan complexe uitdagingen en denk mee over de toekomst van onze software. We verwachten deze functie zelf in te kunnen vullen. Acquisitie vinden we zonde van jouw én onze tijd.

description: Jako PHP Developer se budete podílet na formování business požadavků, architektuře systému a implementaci nových funkcionalit do mladého projektu. title: Młodszy programista PHP (k/m)
description: Nasz zespół tworzy i rozwija własne aplikacje API obsługujące dziennie setki tysięcy zapytań o dane dotyczące pojazdów. Skupiamy się na dostarczaniu rozwiązań nastawionych na wysokowydajne przetwarzanie danych, pracujemy w metodyce SCRUM, dzielimy się naszą wiedzą i doświadczeniem wewnątrz zespołu, lubimy niestandardowe pomysły. Czym będziesz się zajmować: Analizą, projektowaniem oraz implementacją rozwiązań z zakresu rozproszonego przetwarzania danych, mikrousług, skalowania rozwiązań, Big Data; Współpracą z zespołem w procesie wytwarzania oprogramowania z wykorzystaniem technologii PHP 8, REST API, AWS; Rozwojem oraz optymalizacją części bazodanowych naszych aplikacji; Dbaniem o poprawność dokumentacji technicznej rozwijanych aplikacji. Czego od Ciebie oczekujemy: Podstawowej znajomości języka PHP 8 lub innego języka skryptowego; Podstawowej znajomości zagadnień związanych z bazami danych, w tym języka SQL; Podstawowej umiejętności pracy z systemem kontroli wersji (Git); Umiejętności analitycznego myślenia i samodzielnej organizacji pracy; Znajomości języka angielskiego pozwalającej na czytanie i rozumienie dokumentacji technicznej. Co będzie dodatkowym atutem? Znajomość i rozumienie zasad programowania obiektowego oraz wzorców projektowych; Wiedza dotycząca działania usług sieciowych w standardzie REST API; Doświadczenie przy tworzeniu mikroserwisów; Doświadczenie w pracy w Agile/Scrum; Znajomość branży motoryzacyjnej. To oferujemy: Przyjazną atmosferę pracy w kilkuosobowym zespole; Coroczny budżet szkoleniowy do wykorzystania dla pracowników (szkolenia, kursy, studia); Nowoczesne biuro w dobrej lokalizacji z udogodnieniami dla kierowców i rowerzystów; Elastyczne formy współpracy: umowa o pracę, współpracę B2B, umowa zlecenia; Zadaniowy czas pracy w 8-godzinnym systemie; Bezpłatne lekcje języka angielskiego; Min. 20 dni płatnego urlopu także przy formie B2B; Darmowe obiady w ramach Sprint Break’a; Samochód służbowy do dyspozycji pracowników; Cykliczne spotkania integracyjne, a raz w roku wyjazd dla wszystkich pracowników; Więcej informacji udzielamy podczas rozmów kwalifikacyjnych Aplikuj i dołącz do naszego zespołu już dziś! Jednocześnie informujemy, że skontaktujemy się tylko w wybranymi Kandydatami. KLAUZULA OBOWIĄZKU INFORMACYJNEGO 1. Spółka AUTODNA Sp. z o. o. z siedzibą w Łodzi, ul. Obywatelska 128/152, 94-104 Łódź, KRS 0000349742, NIP 5492391545, REGON 121164104 działając zgodnie z art. 13 ust. 1 i ust. 2 Rozporządzenia Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (Dz.U.UE.L.2016.119.1), zwanym dalej „RODO” informuje, iż jest Administratorem Pani/Pana danych osobowych. 2. Kontakt z Administratorem możliwy jest przy wykorzystaniu danych korespondencyjnych Administratora bądź mailowo na adres: contact@autodna.com 3. Pani/Pana dane osobowe będą przetwarzane w celu realizacji procesu rekrutacyjnego oraz w przypadku wyrażenia odpowiedniej zgody również w celu prowadzenia przyszłych procesów rekrutacyjnych. Podstawą prawną przetwarzania danych jest: a) uprawnienie do żądania danych niezbędnych do podjęcia działań przed zawarciem umowy w zakresie wskazanym w art. 221 Kodeksu Pracy (art. 6 ust. 1 lit. b) RODO); b) w pozostałym zakresie dobrowolna zgoda na przetwarzanie danych osobowych, która w każdym czasie może być odwołana (art. 6 ust. 1 lit. a) RODO); c) Ponadto Pani/Pana dane osobowe będą przetwarzane w związku z wymaganiami nałożonym na Administratora przez obowiązujące przepisy prawa (art. 6 ust. 1 lit. c) RODO), d) Dane mogą być również przetwarzane dla celu ustalenia, dochodzenia oraz zabezpieczenia ewentualnych roszczeń oraz obrony przed tymi roszczeniami, związanymi z realizacją procesu rekrutacyjnego – na podstawie art. 6 ust. 1 lit. f) RODO. 4. Podanie przez Panią/Pana danych osobowych jest dobrowolne, jednocześnie niepodanie informacji wskazanych w art. 221 Ustawy z dnia 26 czerwca 1974 r. Kodeks pracy (tekst jednolity: Dz.U.2019.1040 t.j.) spowoduje, iż otrzymane od Pani/Pana dokumenty aplikacyjne nie będą przez Administratora rozpatrywane. 5. Pani/Pana dane osobowe nie będą przekazywane innym podmiotom z wyjątkiem podmiotów świadczących usługi informatyczne oraz rekrutacyjne na rzecz Administratora– na podstawie zawartych umów powierzenia przetwarzania danych osobowych oraz przy zapewnieniu stosowania przez ww. podmioty adekwatnych środków technicznych i organizacyjnych zapewniających ochronę danych oraz organom publicznym uprawnionymi do dostępu do tych danych, na podstawie obowiązujących przepisów prawa. 6. Dane osobowe będą przechowywane przez okres niezbędny do prowadzenia procesu rekrutacyjnego – maksymalnie 3 miesiące, licząc od dnia jego zakończenia, a po tym okresie dla celów i przez okres oraz w zakresie wymaganym przez przepisy prawa lub dla zabezpieczenia ewentualnych roszczeń do momentu ich przedawnienia. W przypadku wyrażenia przez Panią/Pana zgody na wykorzystanie aplikacji do celów prowadzenia przyszłych procesów rekrutacyjnych, Pani/Pana dane osobowe będą przechowywane przez okres maksymalnie 12 miesięcy. 7. Posiada Pani/Pan prawo do: a) dostępu do treści swoich danych oraz ich sprostowania, usunięcia lub ograniczenia przetwarzania, przenoszenia danych oraz prawo wniesienia sprzeciwu wobec przetwarzania. b) wniesienia skargi do organu nadzorczego – Prezesa Urzędu Ochrony Danych Osobowych, gdy uzna Pani/Pan, iż przetwarzanie Pani/Pana danych osobowych narusza przepisy RODO. 8. Posiada Pani/Pan prawo do cofnięcia zgody na przetwarzanie swoich danych w dowolnym momencie, jeżeli przetwarzanie odbywa się na podstawie zgody, przy czym cofnięcie zgody nie wpływa na zgodność z prawem przetwarzania, którego dokonano na podstawie zgody przed jej wycofaniem. 9. Pani/Pana dane osobowe nie będą przekazywane do państwa trzeciego, czy organizacji międzynarodowej. 10. Pani/Pana dane nie podlegają zautomatyzowanemu podejmowaniu decyzji, w tym profilowaniu. KLAUZULA ZGODY W przypadku, gdy chce Pani/Pan, aby dokumenty aplikacyjne były wykorzystywane w przyszłych procesach rekrutacyjnych, prosimy również o umieszczenie w CV klauzuli zgody o następującej treści: „Wyrażam zgodę na przetwarzanie moich danych osobowych zawartych w dokumentach aplikacyjnych przez AUTODNA Sp. z o. o. z siedzibą w Łodzi, w celu realizacji przyszłych procesów rekrutacyjnych. Mam świadomość, że zgoda jest dobrowolna i może być w każdej chwili odwołana, przy czym cofnięcie zgody nie wpływa na zgodność z prawem przetwarzania, którego dokonano na podstawie zgody przed jej wycofaniem”

title: Senior php-ontwikkelaar
description: Dagelijks verwerkt dit platform miljoenen transacties voor duizenden merchants in Nederland. Van webshops tot festivals, van pinterminals tot creditcardbetalingen. Het backend betaalplatform is de hartslag van de organisatie en dat platform wordt gebouwd in PHP en Symfony. Nu zoeken ze een Senior PHP Developer die mee wil bouwen aan de volgende fase: de monoliet ontkoppelen, event-driven architectuur implementeren en het platform klaarstomen voor exponentiële groei. Dit is geen theoretisch verhaal. De migratie van iDEAL naar Wero moet gebouwd worden, nieuwe betaalmethoden moeten worden aangesloten en de schaalbaarheid moet omhoog. Jij krijgt daar eigenaarschap in. Bedrijfsprofiel Dit is een gevestigde Nederlandse payment service provider met een eigen licentie van De Nederlandsche Bank. Het bedrijf bestaat al ruim twintig jaar en is ontstaan vanuit een technische innovatie in de telecomwereld. Inmiddels verwerken ze zowel online betalingen voor webshops als fysieke pintransacties voor onder andere festivals, horeca en grote evenementlocaties. De organisatie telt circa 120 medewerkers, verdeeld over twee kantoren: één in Zuid-Holland (het technische hart) en één in Oost-Nederland (groeilocatie). De cultuur is open, direct en no-nonsense. Hier geen vijf lagen management of politieke spelletjes. De CTO is al meer dan 25 jaar betrokken bij het bedrijf en zijn deur staat letterlijk open. De founder loopt nog dagelijks rond en staat zelf met de voeten in de klei bij productbeslissingen. Ideeën zijn welkom, maar je moet ze wel kunnen onderbouwen. Kom je met een goed verhaal? Dan word je gehoord. Roep je zomaar iets? Dan word je uitgedaagd. Het is een plek waar eigenaarschap en onderbouwing worden gewaardeerd. Het bedrijf zit in een interessante groeifase. Ze zijn geen startup meer, maar ook geen logge corporate. Er is een concreet moderniseringstraject, er worden teams uitgebreid en de ambitie om de volgende stap te zetten is voelbaar. Tegelijkertijd brengt de DNB-licentie een serieuze, gereguleerde context met zich mee. Dat maakt het werk inhoudelijk extra interessant. Functie omschrijving Je komt terecht in een tech-team van circa 30 mensen, verdeeld over meerdere squads: merchant backoffice (GMS), integrations, processing en DevOps. Afhankelijk van je interesses en expertise word je gekoppeld aan het team dat het best bij je past. Dit wordt tijdens het proces samen bepaald. Je werkt aan de backend van het betaalplatform. Concreet betekent dat: integraties bouwen en onderhouden met betaalmethoden zoals iDEAL, Wero, creditcards, BNPL en vouchers. Je werkt aan het merchant backoffice waar klanten hun betalingen, instellingen en overzichten beheren. En je draagt actief bij aan het moderniseringstraject: legacy code refactoren, de monoliet stap voor stap ontkoppelen, event-driven architectuur invoeren en het platform schaalbaarder maken zodat het moeiteloos meeschaalt als het transactievolume verdrievoudigt. Je rapporteert aan een technisch teamlead die zelf ook developer is. Geen managers die PowerPoints maken, maar een lead die begrijpt wat je doet. De lijnen naar de CTO zijn kort. Er is ruimte om door te groeien richting Tech Lead (met bijbehorend salaris tot 7.200 euro bruto per maand). De techstack waarmee je werkt: PHP 8.x, Symfony, MySQL/MariaDB, REST API’s, Docker, Git, Google Cloud Platform (met een lopende migratie naar AWS), Kafka en event-driven architectuur in opbouw. Waarom dit leuk is? Je bouwt mee aan een betaalplatform dat dagelijks door duizenden merchants wordt gebruikt. Het moderniseringstraject is geen verre toekomstmuziek maar iets waar je morgen al aan werkt. De impact van je code is direct zichtbaar: elke transactie die slaagt, elke nieuwe betaalmethode die live gaat, dat is jouw werk. En voor de locatie in Oost-Nederland geldt iets unieks: je bouwt mee aan een volledig nieuw, zelfstandig opererend team. Functie eisen Must-haves: HBO werk- en denkniveau Minimaal 5 jaar ervaring in backend of fullstack PHP-ontwikkeling Gedegen ervaring met Symfony (Laravel is bespreekbaar) Ervaring met MySQL, Linux en webservers Kennis van containerisatie (Docker) en eventbussen (Kafka) Ervaring met of kennis van Domain-Driven Design (DDD) Zelfstandig werkend: je plant je eigen dag, neemt eigenaarschap en hebt geen micromanagement nodig Je denkt mee over architectuur en technische keuzes, maar onderbouwt je voorstellen Woonachtig in de regio Spijkenisse of Enschede (maximaal circa 1 uur reistijd) Bereid om 4 dagen per week op kantoor te werken (3 dagen bespreekbaar voor sterke profielen) Nederlandstalig Nice-to-haves: Ervaring met migratie van monoliet naar microservices Ervaring in fintech of het payments-domein Ervaring met event-driven architectuur Cloudervaring met GCP of AWS Analytisch, pragmatisch en leergierig Arbeidsvoorwaarden Salaris: 4.750 tot 5.750 euro bruto per maand, afhankelijk van ervaring en senioriteit. Contract: jaarcontract met de intentie tot een vast dienstverband. Fulltime (40 uur) of parttime (32 uur). Vakantiegeld conform cao-standaard (8%). Pensioenregeling via een solide pensioenplan. Reiskostenvergoeding voor je woon-werkverkeer. Flexibele werktijden: je deelt je dag zelf in. Hybride werken: 4 dagen op kantoor, 1 dag thuiswerken. Voor uitzonderlijke situaties is 3 dagen kantoor bespreekbaar. Opleidingsbudget: ruimte voor cursussen, trainingen en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Team- en bedrijfsuitjes en een informele werkomgeving waar je collega’s kent. Korte lijnen, geen bureaucratie en een founder die nog dagelijks betrokken is bij het product. Contact en solliciteren Herken jij jezelf in dit profiel en wil je bouwen aan een betaalplatform dat dagelijks door duizenden bedrijven wordt gebruikt? Neem dan vandaag nog contact op voor een vrijblijvend, informeel gesprek. Het sollicitatieproces is kort en persoonlijk: een eerste kennismaking met de technisch teamlead, gevolgd door een tweede gesprek met de CTO en een meeloopochtend met het team. Bel of WhatsApp via +31 6 83 93 19 68 of mail naar r.sadloe@haystackpeople.nl voor een informeel gesprek. Geen CV bij de hand? Een belletje is genoeg om kennis te maken. Waarom nu? Het moderniseringstraject is in volle gang. De migratie van iDEAL naar Wero moet gebouwd worden, de architectuur gaat op de schop en het team groeit. Dit is het moment waarop jij als senior echte invloed kunt hebben op de technische koers van een betaalplatform met miljoenen transacties. Wil jij daar onderdeel van zijn? Bel vandaag nog.

title: DevOps - Symfony Bare Metal Linux
description: OUR STORY: 🇪🇺 Join Scaleway and shape the sovereign cloud of tomorrow ! Since 1999, we have been designing secure, sustainable infrastructures aimed at supporting the most ambitious companies. Historically known for our dedicated servers (Dedibox), we made a strategic shift to cloud computing in 2015. Staying true to our principles of simplicity, flexibility, and technical excellence, we have become one of the leading players in Europe in the sector. With the rise of artificial intelligence, we have strengthened our commitment, supported by the Iliad Group, which is investing €3 billion to develop a serious, sovereign AI alternative to American and Asian giants. Every day, thanks to our fast-growing portfolio of cloud and AI products (bare metal, containerization, serverless, AI, etc.), Scaleway proudly serves thousands of customer across the private and public sector, from corporations like France Télévisions or Hachette Livre, to fast-growing startups like Photoroom and Biolevate, to institutions like the City of Copenhagen. 📍 Our offices are located in Paris, Lille, Toulouse, Rennes, Rouen, Bordeaux and Lyon. WHY WE NEED YOU ? Our growth is driving us to strengthen our Dedibox Compute Foundation team to modernize and scale our legacy backend systems while ensuring production excellence. Your mission will be to maintain and progressively evolve our legacy Dedibox Symfony application toward more modular and service-oriented architectures in order to improve performance, resilience, and long-term scalability in a critical production environment. YOUR FUTURE TEAM We work in a collaborative and international environment where the diversity of Scalers, combined with a spirit of sharing, helps bring new projects to life every day, advancing our ambitions together. You will be part of a team of 6 DevOps Engineers, working alongside 1 Engineering Manager, a dedicated Product team, and a dedicated SRE team. The team operates in an agile setup with strong technical autonomy and is responsible for internally built applications running in a high-volume, production-critical cloud provider environment. You will collaborate daily with cross-functional teams such as hardware, support, billing, and infrastructure. The team recently welcomed new members and reorganized into a tribe structure to support upcoming modernization challenges. YOUR DAILY ROUTINE Develop and maintain backend features using Symfony (PHP 7+) Ensure application maintenance in operational conditions (MCO) in production Debug and resolve production incidents in high-availability environments Contribute to the progressive modernization of a legacy monolith toward modular/microservices architectures Improve application performance and resilience Participate in code reviews and enforce best backend practices Manage deployments through CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI) Work with Docker and DevOps tooling in distributed environments Collaborate closely with SRE, hardware, support, and billing teams Participate in the on-call rotation after onboarding About You HARDSKILLS : Bare metal et Linux : expérience avec configuration et gestion des serveurs Machine Virtuelle et dédiée Minimum 5+ years of backend experience with significant production experience in Symfony Strong expertise in PHP 7+ and Symfony in critical production environments Solid experience maintaining and evolving legacy applications Hands-on experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines (Git, GitLab CI) Good knowledge of distributed systems and Linux server environments SOFTSKILLS : Strong production mindset with a culture of availability and resilience Autonomous and able to quickly take ownership of a broad technical scope Pragmatic and comfortable working with legacy systems while driving modernization Adaptable and capable of switching contexts efficiently Strong cross-team communication skills WHY JOIN THE SCALEWAY ADVENTURE ? ✔ A rich and diverse product offering: Scaleway offers over 100 public cloud products in IaaS, PaaS, and AI. ✔ A cutting-edge technical environment: Scaleway provides modern infrastructures, including high-performance bare metal servers, to tackle exciting technical challenges. ✔ Commitment to responsible cloud: Scaleway is dedicated to a more responsible cloud, with data centers powered solely by renewable energy since 2017, minimizing our ecological footprint and holding top-level certification. 🔜 THE NEXT STEPS … HR interview (30 min) I nterview with your future Manager to understand your technical skills and approach to the role (45 min) Technical interview with the team including practical discussions to validate your expertise (1h) Final discussion with the Head Of to deepen technical topics and assess your fit with the team (45 min) At Scaleway, we are committed to building an inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone has a fair opportunity to thrive. All applications are considered with care, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, ethnic or social background, religion, disability, or any other characteristic. We believe great ideas come from everywhere, and everyone which is why you should definitely apply.

title: PHP Backend Developer
description: Please note that we will never request payment or bank account information at any stage of the recruitment process. Knowledge of DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and Git version control. Familiarity with security principles and best practices in web application development. We welcome and encourage qualified applicants, from all backgrounds, who are excited to contribute to our mission. Named Adweek’s first AI Agency of the Year (2023) and The One Show’s inaugural AI Pioneer Organization, Monks was also awarded Business Intelligence Group’s 2025 Excellence in Artificial Intelligence Award in both the Organizational and AI Product categories. As a trusted partner to cutting-edge innovators in tech, Monks earned titles such as Optimizely Experimentation Partner of the Year (2025), runner-up for the Adobe Firefly Partner Award (2024), and Workato’s AI Visionary Customer Impact Award (2024). Including fresh voices and unique points of view in all aspects of our business not only creates an environment where we can all grow and thrive but also increases our potential to produce work that better represents—and resonates with—the world around us.

title: Senior Full Stack Web Developer (m/w/x)
description: Senior Full Stack Web Developer (m/w/x) bei milch & zucker GmbH Anforderungen Bitte beachte, dass für diese Stelle eine Arbeitserlaubnis für Deutschland erforderlich ist. Legacy-Code) Über das Unternehmen milch & zucker… …seit 1998 sind wir der Ansprechpartner für maßgeschneiderte HR-Software und HR-Marketing. Wir setzen Standards und leben Individualität, die perfekte Mischung aus Software und Marketing, Konzentration und Spaß, Ratio und Emotionen, Intuition und KI. Unser Team freut sich, mit dir Ideen, Können und Leidenschaft zu teilen – und gemeinsam Erfolge zu schaffen. Mit deinen Ecken und Kanten machen wir aus Unterschieden Stärken und schaffen Freiräume und Perspektiven. Wir freuen uns auf dich & uns!
